name: Uterine Fibroid Embolization
description: Uterine artery embolization for fibroid treatment

findings.technique: Uterine artery embolization was performed for fibroid treatment.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Uterine Arteries
sections.content: Right uterine artery [successfully embolized / complete stasis]. Left uterine artery [successfully embolized / complete stasis].

sections.name: Anastomoses
sections.content: No significant extrauterine embolization. Ovarian artery collateral supply minimal.

impression:
1. Successful bilateral UAE performed.
2. Complete stasis achieved bilaterally.
